title: Lfeusi
compiled_truth: Lfeusi is an external contact at [CAISO](companies/caiso). Over the corpus period (2000-07-25 to 2002-02-07), Lfeusi sent 5 and received 2 emails, totalling 7 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tswg](people/tswg-caiso) (5), [20Participants](people/20participants-caiso) (2), [Brenda Lopez](people/brenda-lopez) (2), [Caroline Emmert](people/caroline-emmert) (2), [Charles Byrom](people/charles-byrom) (2).
